title: Kazhugu
subTitle: Sera and his friends retrieve the bodies of those who commit suicide in the town. One such incident brings them in touch with Ayya who warns them to not retrieve the bodies of the policemen he killed.

title: Siragugal
subTitle: Valli finds herself alone in London when she discovers that her husband is having an extramarital affair. She is helped by Chandrasekar, who is also going through a troubled relationship.

title: Enga ooru Sippai
subTitle: Rasaiyya, an army man, grows up thinking that his father and sister have died in an accident. However, when he learns about their murder at the hands of a rich landlord, he decides to seek revenge.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Neram
subTitle: An unemployed engineer struggles to pay back the money he took from a loan shark. His life becomes complicated when he elopes with his girlfriend as her father opposes their relationship.

title: Kandha Kadamba Kathir Vela
subTitle: A strict mother rejects her daughter for marrying a poor man and seeks rich women for her sons. However, all hell breaks loose when the sons too fall in love with women belonging poor families.

title: Sethupathy IPS
subTitle: Sethupathi, a brave cop, saves the prime minister's life from an attack. Later, he faces a dangerous terrorist seeking revenge, racing to stop the criminal's deadly plans.

title: Jay Jay
subTitle: Jagan and Jamuna spend all day chatting on their first meeting. Jamuna puts down her details on a 100-rupee note declaring that if the note comes back to Jagan, then they are destined to meet.

title: Aambala
subTitle: Three brothers head to their native village to reconcile with their estranged relatives. However, a corrupt politician seeks to cause misunderstandings among them for his selfish interests.

title: Ellam Avan Seyal
subTitle: Advocate Laxman, who has his own unconventional methods of serving justice, takes up the case of a college girl who is found dead after a ragging session, and finds the shocking truth behind it.

title: Ellam Avan Seyal
subTitle: Advocate Laxman, who has his own unconventional methods of serving justice, takes up the case of a college girl who is found dead after a ragging session, and finds the shocking truth behind it.

title: Enga Annan Varattum
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Sabash Babu
subTitle: Lalitha becomes extremely disturbed after she loses her newborn child. However, when she meets Babu, an orphan, she finds another reason to live and that is to raise the boy.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Kaadhal Mannan
subTitle: Shiva, a mechanic, travels to Delhi to deliver a letter to Thilothama on a dare. Soon, he falls in love with her when he meets her, but she finds it difficult to reciprocate.

title: Narasimha
subTitle: Rasool Akhtar terrorises the nation when he murders 20 soldiers. Soon, Narasimha, an honest police officer, sets out to foil Rasool's plans.

title: Padikkadavan
subTitle: Rocky, a school dropout, falls for Gayathri, a wealthy woman, but must confront her gangster father and overcome societal prejudices to prove his worth.

title: Spyder
subTitle: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Dhil
subTitle: Kanagavel, an aspiring police officer, beats up a man for misbehaving with his girlfriend. That man turns out to be a corrupt police officer who later starts harassing Kanagavel and his family.

title: Aarya
subTitle: Deepika, a gangster's sister, falls in love with Aarya, a soft-spoken but brave man. However, he faces the wrath of the gangster when he refuses to marry Deepika.

title: Aarya
subTitle: Deepika, a gangster's sister, falls in love with Aarya, a soft-spoken but brave man. However, he faces the wrath of the gangster when he refuses to marry Deepika.

title: Mudhal Udhayam
subTitle: Cheenu lives in a colony with his father. He opposes a local politician, Naina, who terrorizes people. When Cheenu's father is killed, he joins Naina to find the killer, without knowing the reality.

title: Puli Varudhu
subTitle: Ramesh's parents want him to fall in love while he prefers an arranged marriage. At a wedding, he meets and falls in love with Gayatri, and soon they are engaged.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Vande Mataram
subTitle: When several efforts made by officials to improve the welfare of farmers are jeopardised due to terrorist activities, two police officers attempt to combat the threat.

title: Kanave Kalaiyathe
subTitle: Anand is distraught after the woman he loves dies in a blast. However, fate intervenes when he encounters her lookalike, leading to new complications in his life.

title: Anantha Poongatre
subTitle: Jeeva falls for widow Meena and admires her past, but is forced to marry Divya when her father kidnaps Meena's son, using him as leverage to threaten Jeeva into the marriage.

title: Billa
subTitle: Billa, a notorious gangster, is fatally wounded during an encounter with the police. The police commissioner decides to secretly replace him with a lookalike to help catch his gang.

title: Maaveeran
subTitle: Harsha gets falsely implicated for killing Indu's father. However, he soon realises that he and Indu share a bond from a previous life and sets out to set things straight.

title: Kanden Seethaiyai
subTitle: In a bid to pay for her husband's expensive operation, a woman accepts an unusual proposition to become a surrogate mother for a wealthy couple. However, problems begin to crop up in her life.
